direction_specific_dimensions: fluid body copy usually expands from Chinese into English
English body copy needs Western word wrapping and wider readable frames
mixed image/text pages must keep local event/photo anchors instead of page-wide body composition
direction_independent_dimensions: no tiny fallback text for critical roles

principles: Use the Chinese source PDF as the only runtime layout anchor.
English target text often expands and needs Western word wrapping, so expand paragraph frames before shrinking font size.
Do not use official English reference pages during generation; use them only after the run for offline comparison.

metric_value.anti_overfit: classify by current-page font hierarchy plus generic numeric/currency/percentage tokens; never by filename, page number, exact value, or fixed point size

heading.anti_overfit: classify headings against current-page font hierarchy instead of a fixed point-size threshold

target_composition.reason: For zh->en body copy, source bboxes are redaction/order anchors. The English paragraph frame must be recomposed from current-page body band, margins, and remaining readable area before font shrink.

target_language_reflow.reason: For zh->en, same-source bbox fitting over-shrinks body text. Expand current-page text frames within the same page band before shrink.

expandable_text_slots.reason: For zh->en, page-level headings and explanatory short labels are not hard source bboxes. If current-page geometry shows unused whitespace and no table/chart hard constraint, expand the target slot before font shrink.

local_constrained_slot_expansion.reason: For zh->en inside dense panels, charts, and matrix-like pages, source bbox is the local semantic anchor. The executable layout policy must derive width, height, gap, and font thresholds from current source-page geometry instead of reusable fixed values.

local_constrained_slot_flow.reason: When adjacent source lines form one local semantic panel/cell, the target language should be reflowed inside that local panel instead of being inserted line-by-line. The executable thresholds must be run-local derivations from source geometry.

body.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

body_flow.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

table_note.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

footnote.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

heading.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

short_label.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

metric_value.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved per page from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

table_cell.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

legend.anti_overfit: actual point size is resolved from source_size and current-page font quantiles; this profile contains ratios, not fixed sample font sizes

constrained_text_image_fit.reason: For zh->en, textbox probing is preferred. If a body/table-note/footnote region still overflows after frame expansion, render wrapped target text as a last-resort local text image instead of falling back to tiny point text.

fallback.forbid_reason: Critical zh->en prose/title regions must use reflow or wrapped constrained text images; tiny point fallback is a quality failure, not a rendering strategy.

D2_translation: Translate into natural English suitable for an annual report.
Do not copy Chinese punctuation rhythm into English; use Western word wrapping and concise paragraphs.
Provide compact English variants for chart labels, table cells, legends, and side navigation.
D4_layout_plan: For paragraph body copy, treat source bboxes as redaction/order anchors, not hard containers; recompute target visual composition within the current page body band before shrinking font size.
Do not accept tiny English body text merely because it fits the Chinese source bbox.
Preserve graphics, tables, side navigation anchors, and section bands while recomputing body paragraph frames.
D7_quality_gate: Fail if English body font is visually much smaller than annual-report body text or if excessive blank space remains after over-compression.
Judge official English only after the run as offline comparison, not as runtime evidence.
